Beacon in📍Tampa, Florida, is a whole vibe! The aesthetics are perfection! Have you been? 

📍510 Water Street, Tampa, Florida

#tampaflorida #downtowntampa #cocktailbartampa #rooftopbartampa

geo_locations: Tampa, Florida, is a whole vibe! The aesthetics are perfection! Have you been?
pinned_places: Tampa, Florida, is a whole vibe! The aesthetics are perfection! Have you been?

transcription.text: Come check out the highest rooftop cocktail lounge in Tampa. Welcome to Beacon, situated on the 27th floor of the J.W. Marriott Waterside Hotel, right in downtown Tampa. The vibes here are whimsical and I love the organic and art deco aesthetics. It feels upscale yet not stuffy at the same time. This is the perfect spot to grab cocktails developed by the award-winning mixology master, Sean Noden. Beacon offers small bites, so this would be the perfect spot for a snack and cocktail before a game or concert at the nearby Amelie Arena, or before dinner somewhere else downtown. But the real star of the show here are the views of the waterfront in downtown Tampa. From the 27th floor, the views seem to go on forever. I came here around 5 p.m., but I bet it's beautiful to be on the outdoor patio at sunset or at night with the city lights below you. Be sure to save this post so you don't forget to check it out the next time you're in Tampa, Florida. And if you've been, let me know what you think.
